description: Draws a tangent line to a curve or circle at a specified point, centered at the point of tangency. For plots, specify the x-value. For circles, specify the angle in degrees. Used for visualizing instantaneous slope, derivatives, and linear approximation.
utility: Draw a tangent line to a curve at a specific x-value or to a circle at a specific angle

arguments.name: shape
arguments.description: A previously assigned plot or circle variable

arguments.name: param
arguments.description: For plots: the x-coordinate where the tangent touches the curve. For circles: the angle in degrees

arguments.name: length
arguments.description: Tangent line length in model units. Defaults to 80% of the x-axis range

arguments.name: buff
arguments.description: Alternative way to set tangent line length - e.g., buff(5)

alternates.variant: Tangent to a plot at x
alternates.description: Tangent line to f at the given x-value

alternates.syntax:
f = plot(G, "f(x)")
tangent(G, f, x, buff(5))
alternates.description: Tangent line with specific length in model units

alternates.syntax:
f = plot(G, "f(x)")
tangent(G, f, x, c(blue))

alternates.variant: Tangent to a circle at angle
alternates.description: Tangent line to circle at 45 degrees

examples.scenario: Tangent line to 1/x at x=1 on a plotting graph
examples.expression:
graph_1 = g2d(at(3,7), 21.5, 32.4, range(-5, 5), range(-5, 5), type(plotting))
plot_1=plot(graph_1,"1/(x)",range(-5,5))
tangent_1 = tangent(graph_1, plot_1, 1)

examples.scenario: Tangent to x squared at a point with point animator
examples.expression:
graph_1 = g2d(at(4,19), 13.8, 20.3, range(-3, 3), range(-2, 10), type(plotting))
plot_1 = plot(graph_1, "x^2", t(2))
point_1 = point(graph_1, -2, 4)
tangent_1 = tangent(graph_1, plot_1, point_1)
ptanim_1 = pointanimator(point_1, point(graph_1, 2, 4))

examples.scenario: Tangent and normal with angle between them on 1/x
examples.expression:
graph_1 = g2d(at(3,7), 21.5, 32.4, range(-5, 5), range(-5, 5), type(plotting))
plot_1=plot(graph_1,"1/(x)",range(-5,5))
tangent_1 = tangent(graph_1, plot_1, 1)
normal_1 = normal(graph_1, plot_1, 1)
angle_1=angle(graph_1,tangent_1,normal_1,radius(39))

examples.scenario: Tangent at x=0.8 with dashed blue line and secant approaching via variable animator
examples.expression:
f(x) = x^2
graph_1=g2d(at(1,25),14,15,range(-2,3,1),range(-1,5,1), type(plotting))
pl1=plot(graph_1,f)
b=0.8
p1=point(graph_1,b,f(b))
tangent(graph_1,pl1,b,c(blue),dash())
varanim_1=variableanimator(at(2,3),"q1x",2,0.8)
q1=point(graph_1,q1x,f(q1x))
line_2=line(graph_1,p1,q1,c(red))
playanimator(varanim_1)

examples.scenario: Tangent with custom length on second graph in limit lesson
